Actuator Endpoints Exposure Include.description: Comma-separated list of endpoints to expose (use * for all).

Actuator Endpoints Exposure Exclude.description: Comma-separated list of endpoints to exclude.

Actuator Health Enabled.description: Enable or disable the health endpoint.

Actuator Info Enabled.description: Enable or disable the info endpoint.

Actuator Metrics Enabled.description: Enable or disable the metrics endpoint.

Actuator Server Port.description: Port for actuator endpoints, separate from main server port.

Actuator Server Address.description: Network address to bind actuator endpoints to.

Actuator Info App Name.description: Application name shown in the info endpoint.

Actuator Prometheus Enabled.description: Enable or disable Prometheus metrics export.

Application Config Location.description: Locations of config files, overrides defaults.

Application Config Additional Location.description: Additional locations of config files, appended to defaults.

Application Banner Mode.description: Mode for displaying the application banner (off, console, log).

Application Allow Bean Definition Overri.description: Enable or disable bean definition overriding.

Application Allow Circular References.description: Enable or disable circular references between beans.

Application Lazy Initialization.description: Enable or disable lazy initialization of beans.

Batch Job Enabled.description: Whether to execute a Spring Batch job on startup.

Batch Job Name.description: Job name to execute on startup when multiple jobs are present.

Batch JDBC Initialize Schema.description: Database schema initialization mode (always, embedded, never).

Batch JDBC Table Prefix.description: Table prefix for all batch meta-data tables.

Batch JDBC Platform.description: Platform to use in initialization scripts.

Batch JDBC Continue On Error.description: Whether to continue when an error occurs applying a schema script.

Batch JDBC Validate Transaction State.description: Whether to validate the transaction state.

Cache Type.description: Cache type (none, simple, jcache, ehcache, hazelcast, infinispan, couchbase, redis, caffeine).

Cache Cache Names.description: Comma-separated list of cache names to create on startup.

Cache Redis Time To Live.description: Entry expiration time. By default entries never expire.

Cache Redis Key Prefix.description: Key prefix for Redis cache entries.

Cache Redis Use Key Prefix.description: Whether to use the key prefix when writing to Redis.

Cache Redis Enable Statistics.description: Enable or disable Redis cache statistics.

Cache Jcache Config.description: Location of the JCache configuration file.

Cache Jcache Provider.description: Fully qualified class name of the CachingProvider to use.

Datasource Driver Class Name.description: Fully qualified name of the JDBC driver.

Datasource Hikari Connection Timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for a connection from the pool, in milliseconds.

Datasource Hikari Idle Timeout.description: Maximum time a connection can sit idle in the pool, in milliseconds.

Datasource Hikari Max Lifetime.description: Maximum lifetime of a connection in the pool, in milliseconds.

Datasource Hikari Maximum Pool Size.description: Maximum number of connections in the pool.

Datasource Hikari Minimum Idle.description: Minimum number of idle connections in the pool.

Devtools Restart Additional Paths.description: Additional paths to watch for changes.

Devtools Restart Exclude.description: Patterns to exclude from restart triggering.

Devtools Restart Poll Interval.description: Interval to poll for classpath changes.

Devtools Restart Quiet Period.description: Quiet period with no classpath changes before a restart is triggered.

Devtools Livereload Enabled.description: Enable or disable the LiveReload server.

Devtools Remote Secret.description: Secret required to establish a remote devtools connection.

Docker Compose Enabled.description: Enable or disable Docker Compose support.

Docker Compose File.description: Path to the Docker Compose file.

Docker Compose Lifecycle Management.description: Docker Compose lifecycle management (none, start-only, start-and-stop).

Docker Compose Stop Timeout.description: Timeout for stopping Docker Compose services.

Docker Compose Readiness Wait.description: Wait strategy for service readiness (always, never, only-if-started).

Docker Compose Readiness Timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for services to be ready.

Flyway Baseline On Migrate.description: Enable or disable baselining on migrate for non-empty schemas.

Flyway Baseline Version.description: Version to tag the baseline migration.

Flyway Clean Disabled.description: Disable or enable the clean command. Recommended to keep true in production.

Flyway Clean On Validation Error.description: Clean the schema on validation error.

Flyway Table.description: Name of the schema history table.

Flyway Schema.description: Comma-separated list of schemas managed by Flyway.

Flyway Placeholder Replacement.description: Enable or disable placeholder replacement in migration scripts.

Integration Channel Auto Create.description: Whether to create input channels if necessary.

Integration Channel Max Broadcast Subscr.description: Default number of subscribers allowed on a PublishSubscribeChannel.

Integration Channel Max Unicast Subscrib.description: Default number of subscribers allowed on a DirectChannel.

Integration Endpoint Default Timeout.description: Default timeout for blocking operations such as sending or receiving messages.

Integration Endpoint No Auto Startup.description: Comma-separated list of endpoint bean name patterns that should not start automatically.

Integration Endpoint Throw Exception On.description: Whether to throw an exception when a reply is no longer expected by a gateway.

Integration Error Ignore Failures.description: Whether to ignore failures for handlers of the global errorChannel.

Integration Error Require Subscribers.description: Whether to silently ignore messages on the global errorChannel when there are no subscribers.

Integration JDBC Initialize Schema.description: Database schema initialization mode (always, embedded, never).

Integration Poller Fixed Delay.description: Polling delay period. Mutually exclusive with cron and fixedRate.

Integration Poller Fixed Rate.description: Polling rate period. Mutually exclusive with fixedDelay and cron.

Integration Poller Cron.description: Cron expression for polling. Mutually exclusive with fixedDelay and fixedRate.

Integration Poller Initial Delay.description: Polling initial delay, applied for fixedDelay and fixedRate.

Integration Poller Max Messages Per Poll.description: Maximum number of messages to poll per polling cycle.

Integration Poller Receive Timeout.description: How long to wait for messages on poll.

Integration Management Default Logging E.description: Whether Spring Integration components should perform logging in the main message flow.

JPA DDL Auto.description: DDL mode (none, validate, update, create, create-drop).

JPA Show SQL.description: Enable or disable logging of SQL statements.

JPA Format SQL.description: Enable or disable formatting of SQL statements in logs.

JPA Open In View.description: Enable or disable Open Session in View pattern.

JPA Generate DDL.description: Enable or disable DDL generation on startup.

JPA Batch Size.description: Number of statements to batch together.

JPA Second Level Cache.description: Enable or disable second level cache.

Kafka Bootstrap Servers.description: List of host:port pairs for establishing initial connections to the Kafka cluster.

Kafka Client ID.description: ID passed to the server for server-side logging.

Kafka Consumer Group ID.description: Consumer group the consumer belongs to.

Kafka Consumer Auto Offset Reset.description: What to do when there is no initial offset (earliest, latest, none).

Kafka Consumer Enable Auto Commit.description: Whether the consumer's offset is periodically committed in the background.

Kafka Consumer Max Poll Records.description: Maximum number of records returned in a single poll.

Kafka Producer Acks.description: Number of acknowledgments the producer requires (0, 1, all).

Kafka Producer Retries.description: Number of retries for failed sends.

Kafka Producer Compression Type.description: Compression type for producer data (none, gzip, snappy, lz4, zstd).

Kafka Producer Transaction ID Prefix.description: Transaction ID prefix to enable transaction support.

Kafka Listener Concurrency.description: Number of threads to run in the listener containers.

Kafka Listener Ack Mode.description: Listener AckMode (record, batch, time, count, count-time, manual, manual-immediate).

Kafka Listener Auto Startup.description: Whether to auto start the listener container.

Kafka Template Default Topic.description: Default topic to which messages are sent.

Kafka Retry Topic Enabled.description: Whether to enable topic-based non-blocking retries.

Kafka Retry Topic Attempts.description: Total number of processing attempts before sending to the DLT.

Kafka Security Protocol.description: Security protocol used to communicate with brokers.

Kafka Streams Bootstrap Servers.description: Bootstrap servers for Kafka Streams, overrides global property.

Kafka Streams State Dir.description: Directory location for the state store.

Liquibase Change Log.description: Path to the Liquibase changelog file.

Liquibase URL.description: JDBC URL of the database to migrate. Defaults to datasource URL if not set.

Liquibase Username.description: Username for the Liquibase database connection.

Liquibase Password.description: Password for the Liquibase database connection.

Liquibase Liquibase Schema.description: Schema to use for Liquibase objects.

Liquibase Contexts.description: Comma-separated list of runtime contexts to use.

Liquibase Labels.description: Comma-separated list of runtime labels to use.

Liquibase Drop First.description: Whether to drop the database schema first.

Liquibase Clear Checksums.description: Whether to clear checksums in the current changelog.

Liquibase Test Rollback On Update.description: Whether to test rollback when performing update.

Liquibase Tag.description: Tag to apply to the database when running Liquibase.

Logging Level Root.description: Log level for the root logger (TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, OFF).

Logging Level Package.description: Log level for a specific package.

Logging Level Spring.description: Log level for the Spring Framework.

Logging File Name.description: Name and path of the log file.

Logging File Path.description: Directory where log files are written.

Logging File Max Size.description: Maximum size of a log file before it is rotated.

Logging File Max History.description: Maximum number of days to retain rotated log files.

Logging File Total Size Cap.description: Maximum total size of all log files before oldest is deleted.

Mail SMTP SSL Enable.description: Enable or disable SSL for SMTP.

Mail Test Connection.description: Test mail server connection on startup.

RabbitMQ Username.description: Login user to authenticate to the broker.

RabbitMQ Password.description: Login password to authenticate to the broker.

RabbitMQ Virtual Host.description: Virtual host to use when connecting to the broker.

RabbitMQ Addresses.description: List of addresses to which the client should connect.

RabbitMQ Publisher Confirm Type.description: Type of publisher confirms (none, simple, correlated).

RabbitMQ Listener Simple Concurrency.description: Minimum number of listener invoker threads.

RabbitMQ Listener Simple Max Concurrency.description: Maximum number of listener invoker threads.

RabbitMQ Listener Simple Prefetch.description: Maximum number of unacknowledged messages per consumer.

RabbitMQ Listener Simple Acknowledge Mod.description: Acknowledge mode of the container (auto, manual, none).

RabbitMQ Listener Simple Retry Initial I.description: Duration between the first and second delivery attempt.

RabbitMQ Listener Simple Retry Multiplie.description: Multiplier to apply to the previous retry interval.

RabbitMQ Template Routing Key.description: Default routing key for send operations.

RabbitMQ SSL Key Store.description: Path to the key store that holds the SSL certificate.

RabbitMQ SSL Key Store Password.description: Password used to access the key store.

RabbitMQ SSL Trust Store.description: Trust store that holds SSL certificates.

RabbitMQ SSL Trust Store Password.description: Password used to access the trust store.

Redis Database.description: Database index used by the connection factory.

Redis SSL.description: Enable or disable SSL for Redis connection.

Redis Lettuce Pool Max Active.description: Maximum number of active connections in the pool.

Redis Lettuce Pool Max Idle.description: Maximum number of idle connections in the pool.

Redis Lettuce Pool Min Idle.description: Minimum number of idle connections in the pool.

Redis Lettuce Pool Max Wait.description: Maximum time to wait for a connection from the pool. -1ms means no limit.

Redis Sentinel Master.description: Name of the Redis sentinel master.

Redis Sentinel Nodes.description: Comma-separated list of Redis sentinel nodes.

Security User Roles.description: Comma-separated list of roles for the default user.

Security OAuth2 Client ID.description: OAuth2 client ID for a provider.

Security OAuth2 Client Secret.description: OAuth2 client secret for a provider.

Security OAuth2 Client Scope.description: Scopes for the OAuth2 client registration.

Security OAuth2 Redirect URI.description: Redirect URI for the OAuth2 client.

Server Address.description: Network address the server binds to.

Server Compression Mime Types.description: Comma-separated list of MIME types to compress.

Server Compression Excluded User-Agents.description: Comma-separated list of user agents to exclude from compression.

Server Compression Min Response Size.description: Minimum response size required to perform compression, in bytes.

Server Error Include Message.description: Include error message in error responses (never, always, on-param).

Server SSL Key Store Type.description: Type of the key store (PKCS12, JKS).

Spring Application Group.description: Application group, typically used with logging.

Spring Profiles Default.description: Default profile if no profile is active.

Spring Banner Mode.description: Mode used to display the banner (off, console, log).

Spring Lazy Initialization.description: Whether initialization should be performed lazily.

Spring Task Execution Pool Core Size.description: Core number of threads for task execution.

Spring Task Execution Pool Max Size.description: Maximum number of threads for task execution.

Spring Task Scheduling Pool Size.description: Maximum number of threads for task scheduling.

Spring Messages Basename.description: Basename of the message resource bundle.

Spring Transaction Rollback On Commit Fa.description: Whether to roll back on commit failure.

Testcontainers Beans Startup.description: Startup strategy for testcontainer beans (sequential, parallel).

Testcontainers Dynamic Property Registry.description: Determines how DynamicPropertyRegistry injection in @Bean methods is handled (fail, warn, ignore).

Thymeleaf Cache.description: Enable or disable Thymeleaf template caching.

Thymeleaf Mode.description: Template mode (HTML, XML, TEXT, JAVASCRIPT, CSS, RAW).

Thymeleaf Check Template.description: Check that templates exist before rendering.

Thymeleaf Check Template Location.description: Check that the template location exists on startup.

Thymeleaf Content Type.description: Content type of responses produced by Thymeleaf views.

Thymeleaf Reactive Max Chunk Size.description: Maximum size of data buffers used for writing to the response, in bytes.

Web Resources Cache Period.description: Cache period for static resources in seconds.

Web Resources Cache Cachecontrol Max Age.description: Maximum time the response should be cached in seconds.

Web Resources Add Mappings.description: Enable or disable default static resource mappings.

Web MVC Throw Exception If No Handler Fo.description: Throw an exception if no handler is found for a request.

Web MVC Pathmatch Matching Strategy.description: Enable or disable suffix pattern matching in MVC.
